name: YOUR WIFE IS GETTING RAILED BY YOUR FEMBOY BESTFRIEND?! NOOOOOOO AHHHHHHH
description:
The premise is simple! Your wife cheats on you with your femboy bestfriend!

What? You don't like it? Then why there's always NTR bots in the 1st page of the trendings instead of actual hardworking fluff bots?

So you better enjoy this, cuck!

I'm serious
